title: 1.1: Tests that batch GET requests with array notation format execute successfully and return responses
1.2: Tests that batch GET requests with shorthand URL format execute successfully
1.3: Tests that batch GET requests with object notation format execute successfully
1.4: Tests that batch POST requests with body data execute successfully
1.5: Tests that batch PUT requests with body data execute successfully
1.6: Tests verify that HTTP metrics are collected for batch requests
1.7: Tests verify HTTP metrics contain correct request method and status code
2.1: Places the batch GET request test in the js/modules/k6/http directory
2.2: Places the batch POST request test in the js/modules/k6/http directory
2.3: Places the batch PUT request test in the js/modules/k6/http directory
3.1: All tests use the Go testing framework with *testing.T parameter
3.2: All tests follow the Go test naming pattern starting with Test
3.3: All tests use t.Parallel() for parallel execution
3.4: All tests verify the test execution completed without Go-level errors
4.1: Tests use a test runtime or test case setup helper for configuring the test environment
